description: Tamil has many words for happiness — each captures a different shade of the feeling.

synonyms.meaning: General happiness or joy — the most common, everyday word
synonyms.nuance: Used for any happy occasion, big or small
synonyms.example_english: Getting the gift was the reason for my happiness.

synonyms.meaning: Deep, elevated bliss — a higher, more profound joy
synonyms.nuance: Used for spiritual joy or overwhelming happiness; more formal
synonyms.example_tamil: இசை கேட்கும்போது என் மனம் ஆனந்தத்தில் திளைக்கிறது.
synonyms.example_english: My mind is immersed in bliss when listening to music.

synonyms.meaning: Cheerful contentment — satisfaction from something good happening
synonyms.nuance: Often used for happiness caused by someone else's good news; warm feeling
synonyms.example_tamil: உன் வெற்றி கேட்டு என் மனம் சந்தோஷப்பட்டது.
synonyms.example_english: My heart was filled with joy hearing your success.

synonyms.meaning: Delight from receiving something desired
synonyms.nuance: Classical word; implies happiness from getting what you wanted
synonyms.example_english: He jumped with delight upon receiving the gift.

description: Different words for sadness and tears capture the cause and intensity of the emotion.

synonyms.meaning: Deep sorrow or grief — a heavy, lasting sadness
synonyms.nuance: Used for serious situations like loss of a loved one
synonyms.example_tamil: அவரது மறைவு என் மனதில் துயரத்தை ஏற்படுத்தியது.
synonyms.example_english: His passing caused deep sorrow in my heart.

synonyms.meaning: Sadness or regret — feeling bad about something
synonyms.nuance: Milder than துயரம்; often mixed with guilt or disappointment
synonyms.example_tamil: தேர்வில் தோல்வியடைந்தது என் மனதில் வருத்தம் தந்தது.
synonyms.example_english: Failing the exam caused sadness in my heart.

synonyms.meaning: The act of crying — weeping with tears
synonyms.nuance: Refers to the physical act of crying, not the emotion itself
synonyms.example_english: The child searched for its mother while crying.

synonyms.meaning: Tears — the physical tears from the eyes
synonyms.nuance: Refers specifically to the tears themselves; can be tears of joy too
synonyms.example_english: Her tears flowed down her cheeks.

description: How you speak matters — Tamil has precise words for different kinds of speech.

synonyms.meaning: To speak or talk — general, everyday conversation
synonyms.nuance: Neutral; used for any kind of talking
synonyms.example_english: The teacher spoke with the students in class.

synonyms.meaning: To state or declare something — saying something clearly
synonyms.nuance: More formal; implies conveying specific information or facts
synonyms.example_english: He stated the truth with courage.

synonyms.meaning: To address or proclaim — speaking to an audience formally
synonyms.nuance: Used for speeches, announcements or important declarations
synonyms.example_english: The leader addressed the people.

synonyms.meaning: To chat or converse casually — friendly, relaxed talk
synonyms.nuance: Informal and warm; used among friends and family
synonyms.example_english: Friends were chatting together.

description: Beauty in Tamil is described differently depending on what is beautiful and how.

synonyms.meaning: Beauty — the most common word, used for anything beautiful
synonyms.nuance: General purpose; used for people, places, objects, nature
synonyms.example_english: The beauty of this park captivates the heart.

synonyms.meaning: Pleasant delight — beauty that gives pleasure to the senses
synonyms.nuance: Implies enjoyment; the beautiful thing gives you a good feeling
synonyms.example_english: There is great pleasure in listening to music.

synonyms.meaning: Goodness and beauty of character — inner beauty and wellbeing
synonyms.nuance: Refers to inner beauty, virtue, health; not physical appearance
synonyms.example_english: Her inner goodness makes her even more beautiful.

synonyms.meaning: Graceful elegance — refined, gentle beauty
synonyms.nuance: Classical/poetic word; used in Tamil poetry for natural elegance
synonyms.example_english: The graceful beauty of flowers attracts the eyes.

description: How you move tells a story — Tamil captures the manner and purpose of movement.

synonyms.meaning: To walk — moving on foot at a normal pace
synonyms.nuance: The everyday word for walking; no special meaning attached
synonyms.example_english: He walked to school.

synonyms.meaning: To go — moving toward a destination (any means)
synonyms.nuance: Destination-focused; doesn't specify how you travel
synonyms.example_english: Tomorrow we will go to the Singapore library.

synonyms.meaning: To hurry or rush — moving quickly with urgency
synonyms.nuance: Implies speed and purpose; used when late or urgent
synonyms.example_english: They rushed to the hospital.

synonyms.meaning: To come — moving toward the speaker's location
synonyms.nuance: Direction is toward the person speaking, opposite of செல்லுதல்
synonyms.example_english: Mother is coming home.
